meta.title: Our Projects
meta.description: Browse Roofpro's recent residential and commercial roofing projects — re-roofs, flat-roof systems, shingle replacements and metal roofing across the region.

header.description: A close look at recent work across residential and commercial properties, each delivered with the same precision, attention to detail and durable materials that define every Roofpro project.

caseStudy.description: Explore a real roofing transformation, from the initial damage and inspection through expert installation to the complete and lasting final protection.
caseStudy.compareLabel: Drag to compare before and after

after.label: After
after.alt: The same home after a complete roof replacement by Roofpro

before.label: Before
before.alt: The same home before the project, with a worn and aging roof

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: The existing roof was worn, leaking in several areas, and no longer protecting the home.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.description: We installed a durable new roof system with upgraded underlayment and improved attic ventilation throughout.

result.title: Final Result
result.description: A durable, energy efficient roof with enhanced curb appeal and lasting protection for many years.
